description: CLEAN certifying re-run #3 of Batch 1 (Papers 45/46/47/48/49 + synthesis) — convergence test after v4.35.1. Seeds in worktree ../geovac-qa-seed-group1-cert3 (branch qa-seed-group1-cert3, base HEAD 82d8ea2). NEVER committed; worktree removed at end. Fresh seeds (different sites from cert1 + cert2).

seeds.planted: Loosened 'assert abs(val - ref) < 1e-15' -> '< 1e9' (vacuous; defeats the closed-form-vs-reference numeric check).
seeds.truth: C3op_closed_form(n_max) matches sqrt(1-1/n_max) reference to machine eps; a 1e9 tolerance asserts nothing.

seeds.planted: Flipped 'the metric-level inheritance is descoped and the bridge survives as a conditional design' -> '... is established and the bridge is an unconditional result'.
seeds.truth: The metric-level Lambda-inheritance is DESCOPED (degenerate Krein seminorm); the bridge survives only as a conditional design.

seeds.defect_class: C4 wrong-title (arXiv:2209.14384 unchanged so C15 N/A)
seeds.planted: Changed title 'Lorentzian metric spaces and their Gromov-Hausdorff convergence' -> 'Gromov-Hausdorff convergence of globally hyperbolic Lorentzian length spaces'.
seeds.truth: arXiv:2209.14384 (Minguzzi-Suhr) = 'Lorentzian metric spaces and their Gromov-Hausdorff convergence', LMP 114 (2024) 73.

seeds.defect_class: C14 descope zombie (descoped inner arrow flipped to established)
seeds.planted: Flipped 'the inner arrow ..., which consumes Paper 45's Lprop quantity, is descoped' -> '... is established'.
seeds.truth: The inner (propinquity) arrow consumes the degenerate Lprop and is DESCOPED; only the outer norm-resolvent arrow survives.

seeds.defect_class: C14 descope zombie (descoped enlarged route flipped to established)
seeds.planted: Flipped 'route (proof-sketch grade, \emph{descoped} --- the underlying Krein seminorm is degenerate' -> '... \emph{established} --- ...'.
seeds.truth: The enlarged chirality-flip route is a proof-sketch-grade DESCOPED proposal (degenerate Krein seminorm), not established.

controls.claim: K+ annihilation = degeneracy theorem (NEGATIVE); product-carrier signature-agnostic; Paper 38 = state-space GH
C3op closed form sqrt(1-1/n)->1 surviving; strong-form Lorentzian convergence descoped (informal+formal Main theorem carry inline descope)
outer norm-resolvent arrow + three-carrier proof-by-argument (registered); metric/propinquity level descoped
N_t=1 reduces to Paper 38 state-space GH; SS3 axiom lift categorical/structural (degenerate seminorm) flagged; l.526/1356/1375 state-space GH correct
D_max chain 96/96 load-bearing; strict super-additivity generically; Umegaki illustrative; B4' descoped; bousso authors now correct

do_not_reflag_remediation: ALL prior cert fixes are CORRECT and must not be re-flagged: (v4.35.0 cert1) p46 informal-Main-theorem inline (Descoped) note + l.1424 rate-formula relabel; p48 SS1.2+SS3 degeneracy/descope notes; p47 three_carriers proof-by-argument tag + matrix Batch-1 rows; p48/p49 farsi->Collapse/2404.00240; p49 kubota H.; p48 bertozzini title; (v4.35.1 cert2) p49 SS11 bousso authors -> Bousso, Chandrasekaran, Rath, Shahbazi-Moghaddam.
